pi_items.source: Task description and setup instructions specifying the required DICOM node AE Title
setup_task.sh line 15 starting storescp on port 4242
Task description and simulated PACS daemon running on localhost via setup_task.sh
setup_task.sh line 15 redirecting storescp output to /tmp/storescp.log
setup_task.sh lines 6 and 15 configuring and passing RECEIVER_DIR=/tmp/pacs_received to storescp

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic DICOM file dynamically generated with pydicom during setup. The DICOM destination node must be configured to IP 127.0.0.1, Port 4242, and AE Title LOCAL_PACS, matching the local storescp receiver which monitors these parameters, logs its output to /tmp/storescp.log, and saves received files to /tmp/pacs_received.
